pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 8 creates file at this path with UN documentation
Task description specifies 'Page 1 — UN Principal Organs' and 'Page 2 — Specialized Agencies'
Task description: '6 principal organ boxes: General Assembly, Security Council, Economic and Social Council (ECOSOC), International Court of Justice (ICJ), Secretariat, Trusteeship Council'

Task description requires: 'At least 3 subsidiary bodies under the General Assembly' + 'At least 2 subsidiary bodies under the Security Council' + 'At least 2 bodies under ECOSOC' + 'At least 2 Secretariat departments' = 3+2+2+2 = 9 minimum
Task description specifies: 'At least 8 UN specialized agencies'
Task description: 'Color-code each principal organ branch with a distinct fill color (at least 3 different colors)'

pi_items.verified_value: 6 principal organs correctly listed: General Assembly, Security Council, ECOSOC, ICJ, Secretariat, Trusteeship Council
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates reference file with official UN Charter structure verified against https://www.un.org/en/about-us/main-bodies

pi_items.verified_value: 15 specialized agencies listed (WHO, UNESCO, FAO, ILO, IMF, World Bank Group, ICAO, WMO, WIPO, ITU, UNIDO, IFAD, UNWTO, UPU, IMO). All are official UN specialized agencies per https://www.un.org/en/about-us/specialized-agencies
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 109-126 list agencies. Official count is 17 specialized agencies; reference file lists 15 by treating World Bank Group as single entity.

pi_items.metadata_value: UN System Chief Executives Board for Coordination (CEB), UN Charter (1945)
pi_items.verified_value: Reference file is created from official UN documentation. Data verified against https://www.un.org/en/about-us/main-bodies, https://www.un.org/en/about-us/specialized-agencies, and https://www.un.org/en/about-us/un-system
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 16 cites source; data cross-referenced with official UN web sources

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a UN organizational chart diagram using draw.io. The task requires 2 pages with 6 principal organs, minimum 9 subsidiary bodies (3 under GA, 2 under SC, 2 under ECOSOC, 2 Secretariat departments), 8 specialized agencies, and 3 color codes. The reference data is authentic, sourced from official UN documentation. The task files are saved to ~/Desktop/un_org_chart.drawio and ~/Desktop/un_org_chart.png. The metadata contains three contradictions: min_organs (claims 5, requires 6), min_bodies (claims 6, requires 9), and min_agencies (claims 6, requires 8).
